title.en: What a Muslim should say when he is praised

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُؤَاخِذْنِي بِمَا يَقُولُونَ، وَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا لاَ يَعْلَمُونَ، [وَاجْعَلْنِي خَيْراً مِمَّا يَظُّنُّونَ])).

translations.en: O Allah, do not call me to account for what they say and forgive me for what they have no knowledge of [and make me better than they imagine].
